description: A mobile piece of equipment, like a generator, has been moved to a new location on the project site. Its location must be updated in the asset register.

nodes.task_description: Identify the asset that was moved.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the generator's asset ID.

nodes.task_description: Get the new GPS coordinates for the asset.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent obtains the new coordinates from a handheld GPS device.

nodes.task_description: Update the location field in the asset's record with the new coordinates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully updates the asset's location in the system.
